title: taraxacum aurosulum
intro: Taraxacum aurosulum, commonly known as the Dandelion, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant's medicinal properties are due to its leaves, roots, and flowers, which are rich in vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals such as potassium and iron. The health benefits of Taraxacum aurosulum include its ability to act as a natural diuretic, reducing water retention and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and digestive issues. Taraxacum aurosulum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support liver and kidney function, as well as to promote healthy digestion and detoxification.
